descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in overtime during Centennial Cup Western final, taking 2-1 series lead.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes, the B.C. Junior Hockey League champions, defeated the Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in overtime during a Centennial Cup Western Canadian final series game on April 23, 1987. Tony Bobbitt scored the overtime winner just 1:04 into extra play. The victory gave Richmond a 2-1 lead in the best-of-seven Abbott Cup series, with the next games shifting to Richmond Arena beginning Saturday at 7:30 p.m. Coach Orland Kurtenbach acknowledged the team's uneven play but welcomed the victory as the team headed home.
